channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Akwa Ibom TSA policy raises IGR from N7.5bn to N12bn within three months
item.description: The Akwa Ibom State Government says its introduction of the Treasury Single Account (TSA) has significantly improved the state’s Internally Generated Revenue (IGR), pushing it from N7.5 billion in the...

item.title: Public Opinions on Congress Leadership and Ramachandra Guha’s Analysis
item.description: The article gathers readers’ comments on historian Ramachandra Guha’s piece, which argues that the Congress party lacks competent leadership. Many readers agree with Guha, lamenting the party’s over-r...

item.title: Experts raise concerns over potential SpaceX index inclusion and impacts on retirement funds
item.description: Financial commentators and market analysts have raised concerns about the potential inclusion of Elon Musk’s SpaceX in major stock market indexes, warning that such a move could have significant impli...

item.title: PDEA conducts separate anti-drug operations, seizes P13.6 million worth of shabu in Mindanao
item.description: The Philippine Drug Enforcement Agency (PDEA), together with local police units, carried out two separate anti-drug operations in Mindanao that resulted in the seizure of around two kilograms of suspe...

item.title: Wike Says Sandy Onor Is PDP’s Sole Presidential Candidate Amid Party Faction Dispute
item.description: The Minister of the Federal Capital Territory, Nyesom Wike, has declared that Senator Sandy Onor is the only recognised presidential candidate of the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) ahead of the 2027 g...

item.title: Stellantis limits JLR and Tata partnerships to US and India markets, with Europe not currently included
item.description: Stellantis has confirmed that it does not currently plan to extend its recently announced partnerships with Jaguar Land Rover (JLR) and Tata Motors into the European market. The company’s Europe chief...

item.title: Details of armoured military vehicle used during President Ruto’s Wajir Madaraka Day visit
item.description: During Kenya’s Madaraka Day celebrations held in Wajir County, a high-security operation drew attention after a specialised armoured military vehicle was deployed as part of President William Ruto’s s...

item.title: Armed groups demand N150m ransom after abducting Emir of Yashikira’s wives, threaten forced marriages
item.description: Fresh tension don enter Yashikira community in Kaiama Local Government Area of Kwara State after armed terrorists who kidnapped wives of the Emir and other residents reportedly escalate their demands ...

item.title: Report: Bandit group allegedly holds retired Major General Rabe Abubakar captive in Katsina State
item.description: Reports from multiple sources indicate that retired Major General Rabe Abubakar, a former military spokesperson, has allegedly been held captive by a bandit leader identified as Kachalla Muhammadu. Ac...

item.title: MS NOW panel critiques Donald Trump's extensive weekend Truth Social posting activity
item.description: A segment on MS NOW examined a weekend social media activity by President Donald Trump that drew attention for its volume and tone. According to the discussion, Trump posted more than 60 times over a ...

item.title: Expert Warns Trump’s Approach Could Increase Global Instability and Strengthen Iran’s Leverage
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has been cautioned by international security expert Professor Robert Pape about a new phase in what Pape calls the 'escalation trap.' While Trump has so far avoided major m...

item.title: Laos Cave Rescue Efforts Shift to Newly Found Cave Shaft Amid Investigation
item.description: Rescue teams in Laos are investigating a reported 'knocking response' from within a cave, which may indicate the presence of trapped individuals. As the operation continues, efforts have shifted towar...

item.title: Parklands Police Arrest Suspect and Recover Burglary Equipment After Failed House-Breaking Operation
item.description: Police officers in Nairobi's Parklands area, working together with vigilant residents, disrupted a suspected burglary operation targeting a residential complex. The incident happened at Parklands Cour...

item.title: Republican Senators Face Growing Frustration Over Trump’s Loyalty Expectations and Primary Politics
item.description: A New York Times columnist, David French, suggested in a televised interview that some Senate Republicans are quietly reaching a point of frustration with former President Donald Trump. According to F...

item.title: Examining Albanese’s proposed tax changes and their potential impact on housing
item.description: Recent discussions around Prime Minister Anthony Albanese’s proposed tax reforms have sparked significant debate in Australia. While some commentators suggest that these changes could harm property in...

item.title: Canadian streaming regulations face criticism from stakeholders in Canada and the United States
item.description: New federal rules governing streaming services in Canada have sparked criticism from industry groups in both Canada and the United States, highlighting ongoing tensions over digital media regulation a...

item.title: Prince Edward Island Faces Growing Shortage of Skilled Workers and Steps Taken to Address It
item.description: Prince Edward Island (P.E.I.) is projected to face a significant shortage of skilled workers in the coming years, with thousands more professionals needed across various sectors. Local authorities and...

item.title: Debates Over Long Covid: Scientific Uncertainty, Patient Experiences, and Treatment Controversies
item.description: The article explores the ongoing scientific uncertainty and controversy surrounding long Covid, six years after the peak of the COVID-19 pandemic. Despite billions of dollars in research and internati...

item.title: June fuel price adjustments see petrol increase while diesel and paraffin prices drop in South Africa
item.description: South African motorists will experience mixed fuel price adjustments from 3 June 2026, with petrol users facing higher costs while diesel, paraffin and LPG consumers benefit from notable reductions. A...

item.title: NVIDIA Launches RTX Spark ARM-Based Superchip for AI and Graphics in Windows PCs and Laptops
item.description: NVIDIA has officially introduced the RTX Spark, a new ARM-based superchip designed to deliver high-performance AI and graphics capabilities to Windows PCs and laptops. Unveiled at Computex, the RTX Sp...
